user_query:
I exported my bookmarks to input/Bookmarks.json (Chrome Bookmarks JSON format). Please do a read-only audit with no network requests, then produce two files: (1) output/analysis.json containing the full analysis report, and (2) output/plan.json containing a conservative cleanup plan in the specified JSON format. The plan must do all of the following using guid selectors only (and do not apply the plan):
- Remove the exact duplicate under /bookmark_bar/Duplicates by deleting the item with guid "url-dup2".
- Normalize the tracked news URL by updating guid "url-news-tracked" to "https://example.com/news".
- Upgrade the HTTP link by updating guid "url-insecure" to "https://insecure.example.com/page".
- Delete the empty folder with guid "fld-old".
- Move the "Solo Link" with guid "url-solo" out of its singleton folder into the root bookmark bar (use target {"root": "bookmark_bar"}), then delete the singleton folder with guid "fld-single".
- Rename the weakly named bookmark with guid "url-weakname" to "Docs".
Write the analysis to output/analysis.json and the plan to output/plan.json. Do not modify the input file and do not perform any network requests.
